evidence: DCD Sep 10 2018 reported Aligned Energy entering Northern Virginia with 26-acre 180MW campus in Ashburn; IAD-01 is building 1 on that campus; completed Sep 2019.
STACK press release Jan 5 2022 announced 216MW NVAL2 campus at 22285 Lockridge Road Sterling (Loudoun); land acquired Dec 15 2021; first phase targeted Q3 2023.
Aligned press release Jun 2 2020 announced construction start on second 120MW building (IAD-02) adjacent to IAD-01; campus originally announced Sep 2018.
Aligned press release Jul 26 2022 announced new Sterling hyperscale campus; IAD-03 (72MW/430k sqft at 22715 Relocation Dr) named as phase-1 facility; delivery targeted fall 2023.
DCD confirms Cologix bought former church site at Beaumeade Corporate Park Ashburn for $38M in July 2018; construction started 2020; 120MW ASH1 completed 2023.
CyrusOne press release Dec 9 2016 announced groundbreaking at 40-acre Kincora property in Sterling for NVA5 (Sterling V); 654k sqft 105MW campus; opened 2017.

Virginia Business Sep 13 2018 reported EdgeCore acquired 36.8 acres in Sterling for data-center campus; DCD/DgtlInfra confirm company "first announced plans in 2018"; VA1 (54MW Maries Road) is the first operational building from that campus.
TA Realty press release May 4 2021 announced $1.8B campus on east side of Sycolin Road in Leesburg; AWS later leased all 5 buildings; Leesburg 1 (66MW) is first building delivered.
Same NVAL2 campus as NVAL2 (Lockridge Road Sterling); STACK Jan 5 2022 announcement covers three buildings totaling 216MW; NVAL2b is the second or third building on that campus.

Digital Realty press release Sep 24 2018 announced acquisition of 424 acres adjacent to Dulles airport for $236.5M; DCD confirms first building (IAD44) delivered 2023; Digital Dulles 3 (op 2024) is 3rd building on campus; building-level groundbreaking not separately announced.

Google timeline: announced Leesburg campus in 2018 and opened first DC in 2019; Google's own page states "2021: announces expansion of second data center in Loudoun County"; SBP2 (op 2021) is that second-campus expansion; campus-level announcement was 2018.
